//: Cached AZ answer for account=975049998516 region=us-east-1 (issue 040). aws-cdk-lib's Vpc construct validates any explicit `availabilityZones` prop against Stack.availabilityZones, which otherwise triggers a live AWS context-provider lookup (an assumed-role SDK call) even though the AZ names it validates are already hardcoded in lib/network-stack.ts.
